examples: Many had fled in their nightclothes.
He is wearing only nightclothes, and there is no blood on him.
For example, children could rinse out their wet nightclothes.
The blasts sent workers running into the street, many in their nightclothes or underwear.
Still in my nightclothes, I carried the bag to the dumpster, not looking inside to verify whether Fumiko had taken any of the items.
